comments.text: Starting work on this. Will break it into tasks for the login form, API integration, and session management.
Please make sure we handle the OAuth provider callback as well. Updated the acceptance criteria.
Login form and session management are done. OAuth callback is still in progress — should be wrapped up by end of sprint.
Reproduced on Safari 17.1. The issue is a missing polyfill for structuredClone. Will submit a fix.
